title: sourcing map Nut Driver Drill Bit 3/8 Inch Socket 1/4" Hex Shank 3" (65mm) Long Magnetic 6-Point Sockets Quick Change Phosphated CR-V Steel Bolt Setters for Power Drill Drivers, Black
availability_text: Only 2 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Size - 3/8 inch 6-point socket; 1/4" (6.35mm) quick-change hex shank, 3" (65mm) total length. Nut driver drill bit offers compact maneuverability for precise fastening in tight spaces.

Material - The nut driver drill bit tool is crafted to engage effectively with hexagonal socket screws and bolts. The tool is made of chrome vanadium alloy steel, ensuring robustness, longevity, abrasion resistance, and rust resistance, and the phosphating surface enhances high strength and hardness, improves wear resistance and corrosion resistance.

Features - Power nut drivers feature a magnetic tip, ensuring screws and bolts are securely held in place for effortless and precise application. Hexagonal design helps achieve a solid grip and effective torque transfer from the tool to the fastener, reducing the effort needed. Additionally, the extended length design of this nut driver drill bit tool provides enhanced reach and access in tight spaces, ensuring it can effectively handle a wide range of applications with precision and ease.

Applications - Nut driver sockets are suitable for tasks that require precise driving of hexagonal nuts and bolts, such as assembling furniture, machinery repairs, and automotive maintenance. They are also perfect for home DIY projects where secure and quick fastening is essential.

Notice - Insert the nut driver bit into the chuck of a compatible drill or driver. Align the tool with the fastener and apply steady pressure while operating the drill. Ensure the tool is correctly secured in the drill's chuck to prevent detachment. Always check that the nut or bolt matches the driver size before application to avoid stripping or damaging the fastener.
